_comment_wide_open: wide_open_mode: false (changed 2026-05-15) — production-ready backtest. Enforces detector cap_segment filters, Stage-0 dedup, max_detections_per_symbol cap, and single-position-per-symbol semantics. Use wide_open_mode=true ONLY for OCI capture runs that pre-filter offline; we now want the live-equivalent funnel.
_comment_rev2_cross_cutting: Cross-cutting rules from design Section 10a: expiry-day exclusion, gap-day cross-detector exclusion, universe-wide circuit-band exclusion. Implemented in services/universe_filter.py helpers; detectors call them as first-condition prerequisite.
_comment_setups: OCI prod-ready-backtest setups. Active: gap_fade_short, circuit_t1_fade_short, long_panic_gap_down, circuit_release_fade_short. (Note: delivery_pct_anomaly_short runs from base config with its per-setup wide_open=false flag; it doesn't need an override entry here.) long_panic_gap_down added 2026-05-15 — Cell B + regime-density guard + universe contributor wired. circuit_release_fade_short added 2026-05-16 — sanity gauntlet passed (Disc PF 2.12 / OOS 3.13 / Holdout 4.53) per specs/2026-05-16-new-setup-candidates.md C-03. Retired setups history: see docs/retired_setups.md.
